claim_wording_recommendation: StabilityResidual is competitive with GSL-inspired baselines. LDS-Proxy shows competitive results with a Cora-specific advantage driven by pruning budget effects. The paper should report GSL proxy comparisons honestly and position StabilityResidual as a training-dynamics-based alternative.
next_implementation_steps: Run full LDS reproduction from official repository
Run full IDGL reproduction from official repository
Consider narrowing claim to competitive-with-GSL if full LDS wins
